'''daboyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dracocephalum|dracocephalum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dracocephalum|dracocephalum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| daboyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbeyeth|dæbeyeth]] || [[word:dæbeyej|dæbeyej]] || [[word:dæbeyesh|dæbeyesh]] || [[word:dæbeye|dæbeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:daboboyoth|daboboyoth]] || [[word:daboboyoj|daboboyoj]] || [[word:daboboyosh|daboboyosh]] || [[word:daboboyo|daboboyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:daboyoth|daboyoth]] || [[word:daboyoj|daboyoj]] || [[word:daboyosh|daboyosh]] || [[word:daboyo|daboyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabofyoth|dabofyoth]] || [[word:dabofyoj|dabofyoj]] || [[word:dabofyosh|dabofyosh]] || [[word:dabofyof|dabofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daboyotho|daboyotho]] || [[word:daboyojo|daboyojo]] || [[word:daboyosho|daboyosho]] || [[word:daboyoko|daboyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daboyoth|daboyoth]] || [[word:daboyoj|daboyoj]] || [[word:daboyosh|daboyosh]] || [[word:daboyo|daboyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daboyothol|daboyothol]] || [[word:daboyojol|daboyojol]] || [[word:daboyoshol|daboyoshol]] || [[word:daboyokol|daboyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daboyothotho|daboyothotho]] || [[word:daboyojojo|daboyojojo]] || [[word:daboyoshosho|daboyoshosho]] || [[word:daboyoko|daboyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daboyothon|daboyothon]] || [[word:daboyojon|daboyojon]] || [[word:daboyoshon|daboyoshon]] || [[word:daboyokon|daboyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daboyothoro|daboyothoro]] || [[word:daboyojoro|daboyojoro]] || [[word:daboyoshoro|daboyoshoro]] || [[word:daboyokoro|daboyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
